translated: Then Jesus said to them, "Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; and they will see me there." The women's announcement

translated: Jesus asked them, "Can the wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast."

ref: Some Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do that!”
